shared_properties: Umbra-derived horn silhouette and compact limb structure.
Teal inner glow remains the main source of silhouette readability.
differences: Frame size reduces to 24x36 for the smaller support summon role.
Glow intensity increases and body opacity drops to suggest a spectral duplicate.
Idle motion limits to a low-amplitude pulse because the Echo remains planted as weight ballast.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteSheetBundle on a separate EchoAnchor entity and keep visual opacity controlled through a material tint.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load character/player_echo_idle_4f_6fps.png through AssetServer before echo summon systems begin.
runtime_notes: Echo pivot aligns to the Umbra foot baseline when placed on a scale deck.
Opacity is adjusted in engine while source art preserves a complete silhouette.
Loop cadence remains calm so the Echo reads as a support state rather than a second player.

context.usage: Summoned Echo silhouette that acts as a one-unit weight anchor on the scale rig.

shape.silhouette: Small translucent Umbra echo with reduced limb length, compact horns, and a bright center pulse.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 96x36 px with four 24x36 frames.
Echo silhouette reads as a smaller derivative of Umbra at a glance.
Center pulse changes brightness without altering the outer contour.

reference_images.label: umbra_scale_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Art deco tower skyline, twilight palette, gold trim rhythm, and layered silhouette depth anchor.

reference_images.label: umbra_scale_character
reference_images.purpose: Umbra body proportions, horn silhouette, limb taper, and exposure glow anchor.
